name: Automatic Approval of Fuel Plant Permits

eligibility.description: Applies to 'eligible distilled spirits plants' (under 10,000 proof gallons/year) that have submitted a complete application for fuel use production.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: If the Secretary fails to make a determination on a small fuel plant operating permit within 45 days of notice of a complete application, the application is treated as approved.
